CustomField.formula: if( leaseworks__Return_Month__c , IF(leaseworks__Is_MR_greater_than_EOLA__c , IF(Text(leaseworks__Fx_Component_Output__r.leaseworks__RC_Applicability__c) = 'Remaining To Event', leaseworks__Hours_Remaining__c - leaseworks__Fx_Component_Output__r.leaseworks__TSO_Start_of_Lease__c, leaseworks__Fx_Component_Output__r.leaseworks__TSO_Start_of_Lease__c - leaseworks__TSO__c ), leaseworks__TSO__c) , null)
CustomField.label: EOLA FH/TSO
